summary: All 5 test requirements PASSED for 8 new RIASEC questions (r1-r8) integration. Backend correctly returns 20 questions including r1-r8, RIASEC calculation weights direct responses properly, and frontend displays 21 steps (20 questions + birth date).

Test 1 - API questionnaire/visual 20 que.details: API returns exactly 20 questions. Questions r1-r8 are present at positions 13-20. 5 visual (r1,r2,r3,r5,r7) + 3 ranking (r4,r6,r8) RIASEC questions confirmed.

Test 2 - RIASEC with r1=R, r4=R,C,I,S →.details: Profile with r1=R and r4='R,C,I,S' correctly yields R in dominant position. Direct question weighting (5 pts each) properly influences RIASEC scores.

Test 3 - RIASEC with r1=I, r2=A, r5=A →.details: Profile with r1=I, r2=A, r5=A correctly yields A or I in top positions. Artistic and Investigator types properly calculated from direct responses.

Test 4 - Frontend displays 20 questions.details: Frontend shows 'Étape 1/21' for birth date, then 'Question 1/20' through 'Question 20/20' for the visual questionnaire. Total = 21 steps as expected.

Test 5 - Coherence WITH vs WITHOUT RIASE.details: Same MBTI/DISC base profile with different RIASEC answers produces measurably different RIASEC scores. Direct questions create meaningful differentiation.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ RIASEC questions r1-r8 correctly structured: 5 visual (2-choice) + 3 ranking (4-choice)
✓ Direct question weighting: 5 pts for single choice, ranking follows 5/3/2/1 pts pattern
✓ calculate_riasec_profile() at line 3981 properly processes all r1-r8 answers
✓ Frontend correctly displays all 20 questions in order v1-v12, r1-r8
context_for_next_testing_agent: 8 new RIASEC questions (r1-r8) are fully integrated. Test file test_riasec_8_new_questions.py covers: (1) API returns 20 questions with r1-r8, (2) Direct RIASEC responses properly weight R/I/A/S/E/C scores, (3) Frontend displays 21 total steps. Questions r1,r2,r3,r5,r7 are visual 2-choice (5pts each), r4,r6,r8 are ranking 4-choice (5/3/2/1 pts).
